song.title: Come Home Running
song.lyrics:
[V1] . A Oh heart of mine . D Why must you stray . F#m From one so fair . D You run away . A C# And one more time . F#m You have to pay .D A E A The heaviness of needless shame
[V2] Oh heart of mine come back home You've been too long Out on your own And He's been there All along Watching for you down the road ---
[C] . D E So come home running . A His arms are open wide . D E His name is Jesus . A And He understands . D E He is the answer . F#m You are looking for . F#m/E D So come home running . E A Just as you are
[V3] Oh child of God So dearly loved And ransomed by The Savior's blood And called by name Daughter and son Wrapped in the robe of righteousness
